title: Mariyaan
subTitle: Mariyaan Joseph, a fisherman, is forced to take up employment in Sudan after his girlfriend faces financial issue. However, he finds himself in danger after crossing paths with some extremists.

subTitle: Son of a wealthy man Rishi leads a carefree lifestyle. However, his life begins to change when he meets Nila, a college student and gradually falls in love with her.
